TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Matanki ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 121 buwan, 331 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 322 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 79%, Amis 2%, Tayan 5%, Setik 3%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Matanki hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Matanki hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Matanki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Matanki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Matanki hya' ga Thgahan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Matanki ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ matanki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa tħɣaħan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ matanki ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Matanki ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 121 buwan, 331 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 322 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 79%, Amis 2%, Tayan 5%, Setik 3%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Matanki hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Matanki hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Matanki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Matanki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Matanki hya' ga Thgahan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Matanki ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ matanki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na matanki ħjaʔ ɣa tħɣaħan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ matanki ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
